Title: Creates a volunteer firefighter training fund; appropriation
Summary: Creates a volunteer firefighter training fund; makes an appropriation therefor.
LawCode: Amd §72-g, Gen Muni L; add §99-mm, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general municipal law and the state finance law, in relation to creating a volunteer firefighter training fund; and making an appropriation therefor
